title: Mesadenus affinis

As a member of the family Velloziaceae, Mesadenus affinis shares similarities with other plants in this family, such as Vellozia and Barbacenia. The order Pandanales is a group of plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Mesadenus affinis is subject to change as new research and data become available.
